listings.title: NUMARK Mixtrack Pro FX
listings.body: BRAND NEW USED TWICE.. BOUGHT AS A GIFT COULD NOT RETURN IT.COST $244.00 SELLING FOR $180.00 COMES WITH BOX CABLE AND PAPERWORK Mixing Starts Here Serato DJ Lite FREE The Mixtrack Pro FX is a Serato DJ controller GREAT FOR MIXING NUMARK HAS BEEN AROUND FOR 55 YRS.JUST AS GOODAS PIONEER. . It has everything you need  large 6-inch jog wheels, a 24-bit digital audio interface .six dedicated software effects buttons  16 performance pads for hot cues, auto loop, fader cuts and sampling. Plus, you can even stream the music you love direct from TIDAL or SoundCloud via Serato DJ Lite! With Mixtrack Pro FX, Dimensions (width x depth x height) 21.1" x 9.7" x 2.0" 53.6 x 24.6 x 5.1 cm Tech Specs Outputs 1 RCA stereo pair 1 1/4" (6.35 mm) TRS 1 1/8" (3.5 mm) TRS Inputs 1 1/4" (6.35 mm) TS Power USB bus power Audio 44.1 kHz, 24-bit Dimensions (width x depth x height) 21.1" x 9.7" x 2.0" 53.6 x 24.6 x 5.1 cm Weight 5.35 lbs. 2.4 kg Mac - System Requirements macOS Catalina 10.15 macOS Mojave 10.14 macOS High Sierra 10.13 PC - System Requirements Windows 10 Note: 64-bit only (32-bit operating systems not supported) PICK UP  CASH  ONLY!!!!!
